resources.string: Loading Mimi codec (GPU convs + CPU transformers)…

On-device hybrid codec ✓

encode %1$d ms · decode %2$d ms · RTF %3$.2f
%4$d codebooks × %5$d frames = %6$d ints · 24 kHz

Playing reconstructed… tap to A/B.
%1$s\n\nModel not found? Push the graphs first with install_to_device.sh
